utility_evaluation.REASONING: The format has 7 required items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final package, all 7 items appear. Each item is fully specified with details and costs where applicable. Transportation includes flight details and cost, accommodation includes hotel details and cost, activities include details and cost, additional_services includes details and cost, and total_budget is given as a total figure. Thus, all items are covered and fully specified.
